name: Sessions View
description: VS Code WebviewView sidebar panel that lists open and saved Claude/shell sessions for the active worktree. Shows live activity indicators (blink), session icons, and exposes rename/close/set-icon context menu actions.
guidelines: Subscribe to both onDidChange (structural changes) and onBlink (activity flicker) to avoid refreshing idle rows unnecessarily.
Session icon codicons are configurable per-session and persisted; new icon takes effect on next terminal open since VS Code has no live iconPath setter.
anti_patterns: Do not trigger a full tree refresh on every blink tick — only refresh active session rows to avoid idle-row flicker.
decisions: Uses retainContextWhenHidden to preserve webview state across panel collapse.
